india_trends.title: Small-cap index jumps 13%, eclipses Nifty 50 returns in April: Should you chase the momentum amid macro woes?
india_trends.summary: Experts appear cautious about the persisting geopolitical uncertainties. They believe that while it is not the wrong time to look at small-caps, it is also not a phase to be overly aggressive on them.

india_trends.title: Jefferies says Gold enters consolidation phase after retail-driven frenzy buying this year
india_trends.summary: Global investment firm Jefferies in its latest report said that gold has entered a consolidation phase following a strong retail-driven buying surge seen late last year and early this year across key markets including India, China and the United States.

india_trends.title: Groww vs Angel One: After up to 35% rally in a month, which stockbroker's shares should you buy now?
india_trends.summary: Shares of Groww and Angel One have surged 28–35% in a month, delivering strong gains to shareholders despite recent market volatility, with analysts seeing better risk-reward in one of them. Groww’s parent has risen over 31% in 2026 so far, while Angel One is up 24%.

india_trends.title: HDFC Bank Q4 preview: PAT seen stable with up to 10% YoY growth; NIM pressure persists. 8 things to watch
india_trends.summary: HDFC Bank is expected to post a steady Q4FY26, with PAT likely growing 6–10% YoY and NIM pressure persisting. Brokerages foresee moderate NII growth, stable asset quality, and healthy deposits. Key monitorables include NIM trajectory, credit costs, loan–deposit gap, and management commentary after t

india_trends.title: Mumbai’s skyline is soaring. So is the pressure on housing
india_trends.summary: Mumbai's booming real estate market sees global financial giants occupying luxury towers while low-income residents like taxi driver Ramu Virmale negotiate for modern housing. Developers are redeveloping slums, promising new apartments but raising concerns about displacement and the loss of communit

india_trends.title: Gujarat Gas rises 7% after Nomura upgrade. Is the Iran war a buying opportunity?
india_trends.summary: Gujarat Gas shares saw a significant jump after a major brokerage upgraded the stock. The US-Iran conflict is creating supply chain disruptions, impacting fuel availability. This situation presents opportunities for Gujarat Gas, especially in the Morbi region. The company is poised for potential vol

india_trends.title: Suzlon Energy jumps 4%, extends five-day rally to nearly 18%. Should you buy?
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy shares extended gains, rising nearly 18% over five sessions, supported by strong momentum and improving investor interest. JM Financial remains bullish with a Buy rating, despite execution concerns. Elevated RSI indicates overbought conditions, while rising institutional holdings and e

india_trends.title: Rupee touches one-week high on report of RBI plan to ease oil refiners' dollar bids
india_trends.summary: The rupee hit a one-week high as expectations of RBI measures to curb oil refiners’ dollar demand boosted sentiment and eased pressure on the currency.

india_trends.title: Wipro shares slide 4% as buyback fails to offset weak guidance, soft Q4 numbers
india_trends.summary: The stock has lost over 23% year-to-date and is down 13.5% over the past year

india_trends.title: AgriTech could add $90 billion to Southeast Asia’s GDP by 2033: Report
india_trends.summary: While investments have seen a recent decline due to structural challenges, opportunities abound in digital value chains, AgriFinTech, deep technology, and sustainable food brands, with aquaculture also presenting a major growth area.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver price today, 17 April: Check rates of 24 kt, 22 kt gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
india_trends.summary: Gold and Silver price today: Gold rates were volatile in early trade on Friday amid focus on the proposed US-Iran talks. However, dollar weakness and a fall in crude oil prices capped losses for the yellow metal.

india_trends.title: Global streaming platforms trade control for scale in India’s OTT market
india_trends.summary: Streaming powerhouses are choosing to partner with Indian digital platforms, looking to delve into the rapidly expanding OTT market without significant risk. Leaders like BBC, Disney+, and Warner Bros Discovery are leveraging local expertise to tap into a massive user base.

india_trends.title: Suzlon Energy shares climb 3.3% amid wind energy tailwind narrative
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy stock has surged 25.81% over the past month and 14.56% in the past week

india_trends.title: Akshaya Tritiya 2026: These two Nifty 50 stocks’ one-year returns outshine gold returns
india_trends.summary: Gold has emerged as a standout performer, delivering strong returns since Akshaya Tritiya 2025. The strong performance of gold was driven by sustained central bank and investor buying amid persistent macroeconomic and geopolitical uncertainties, reaffirming its status as the safe-haven asset.

india_trends.title: China’s Surging Tech Stock Index Faces Rising Concentration Risk
india_trends.summary: China’s tech-heavy ChiNext Index is becoming increasingly concentrated as it powers to an 11-year high, buoyed by earnings beats from a small group of heavyweight stocks.

india_trends.title: Om Power Transmission shares jump after 6% premium debut on NSE
india_trends.summary: The stock listed at ₹186 on the NSE, marking a premium of 6.2% to the IPO price; It extended gains during the session to hit a high of ₹195.30

india_trends.title: Top stock picks for 2026: Defence, banks, power, and infra on Ambareesh Baliga's radar
india_trends.summary: Market analyst Ambareesh Baliga suggests a stock portfolio for the next one to five years. He highlights defence stocks like Mazagon Dock and Bharat Electronics. Banking picks include HDFC Bank and Kotak Mahindra Bank. For infrastructure, Larsen & Toubro is recommended. In power, Tata Power, NTP

india_trends.title: Waaree Renewable Technologies shares jump over 13% after strong Q4 results
india_trends.summary: Waaree Renewable Technologies share price rose 13.5% on April 17 after reporting a 66% increase in net profit to ₹155.72 crore for Q1 FY26, driven by higher revenues of ₹1,102.40 crore.

india_trends.title: NMDC share price: PSU stock hits 52-week high on strong Q4 results 2026 hopes. Should you buy?
india_trends.summary: NMDC share price today opened with an upside gap and touched a new 52-week high of ₹88.07 apiece on the NSE
